query:
SELECT 
  ma.id AS agendamento_id,
  ma.scheduledDate,
  ma.title,
  ma.status,
  ap.alunoId,
  a.name AS aluno_nome
FROM mentor_appointments ma
LEFT JOIN appointment_participants ap ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON ap.alunoId = a.id
WHERE ma.consultorId = 39
AND ma.scheduledDate >= '2026-03-01' AND ma.scheduledDate <= '2026-03-31'
ORDER BY ma.scheduledDate;
